get.description: This endpoint returns a list of surahs based on the provided query parameters.

parameters.name: mushaf
parameters.description: The mushaf name to filter the surahs.

parameters.name: lang_code
parameters.description: The language code for surah translations.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria for the surah list.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order (ascending or descending).

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start index for pagination.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End index for pagination.

200.description: Successful response containing a list of surahs.

period.description: The period of revelation (e.g., Makki or Madani).

number_of_ayahs.description: The number of ayahs in the surah.

arabic.description: The Arabic name of the surah.

pronunciation.description: The way in which a word is pronounced..

translation_phrase.description: A phrase that translates the meaning of the surah.

post.description: Add a new surah to the database.

requestBody.description: Details required to add the surah

period.description: Indicates whether the surah is Makki or Madani.

number.description: The number of the surah in the Mushaf.

mushaf_uuid.description: The UUID of the Mushaf in which the surah belongs.

bismillah_status.description: Determines whether Bismillah exists in the surah.

bismillah_as_first_ayah.description: Determines if Bismillah is the first ayah of the surah.

name_translation_phrase.description: The translation phrase for the surah name in the desired language.

name_pronunciation.description: The pronunciation of the surah name in Arabic.

name_transliteration.description: The transliteration of the surah name from Arabic to Latin.

200.description: The surah has been successfully added to the database.

get.description: Returns the single surah

schema.description: Specifies the format of the response. Options are 'text' or 'word'
Language code for the translation. Defaults to 'en' if not provided

200.description: Returns the single surah

translation_phrase.description: Translation phrase for the surah name

period.description: Period of the surah (e.g., Makki or Madani)

bismillah_as_first_ayah.description: Indicates if 'Bismillah' is the first ayah of the surah

bismillah_text.description: Text of 'Bismillah' if it is the first ayah

number_of_ayahs.description: Number of ayahs in the surah

sajdah.description: Indicates if the ayah has sajdah

text.description: Text of the ayah (if format is 'text')

items.description: Words of the ayah (if format is 'word')

post.description: Edit surah with the specified UUID.

parameters.name: surah_uuid
parameters.description: UUID of the surah to edit.

requestBody.description: Details required to update the surah

name_pronunciation.description: Optional pronunciation of the surah name.

name_translation_phrase.description: Optional translation phrase of the surah name.

name_transliteration.description: Optional transliteration of the surah name.

period.description: Indicates whether the surah is Makki or Madani.

bismillah_status.description: Determines if Bismillah is present in the surah.

bismillah_as_first_ayah.description: Indicates if Bismillah is treated as the first ayah.

mushaf_uuid.description: The UUID of the Mushaf associated with the surah.

200.description: Surah edited successfully.

500.description: Internal server error occurred during the operation.

error_name.description: A unique identifier for the error type.

delete.description: Deletes the surah identified by the specified UUID.

schema.description: UUID of the surah to be deleted.

200.description: The surah identified by the UUID has been successfully deleted.
